[[Danny Orr]] (caretaker)
[[Daryl Powell]] | captain = [[Michael Shenton]] | stadium = [[The Jungle (Wheldon Road)]] | agg_attendance = 81,979 | avg_attendance = 6,306 | high_attendance = 9,103 | low_attendance = 3,222 | top_tries = [[Justin Carney]] (21) | top_goals = [[Jamie Ellis]] (59) | top_points = [[Jamie Ellis]] (147) | prev_season = [[2012 Castleford Tigers season|2012]] | next_season = [[2014 Castleford Tigers season|2014]] | list = yes | list_link = List of Castleford Tigers seasons }} The '''2013 season''' was the '''[[Castleford Tigers]]'''' 88th season in the [[Rugby Football League]] and their 6th consecutive season in the top flight of [[Rugby league in England|English rugby league]]. The club competed in the [[2013 Super League season|2013 Super League]] and the [[2013 Challenge Cup]]. Castleford began the season under head coach [[Ian Millward]], before he was dismissed in April. After assistant [[Danny Orr]] took charge as caretaker, [[Daryl Powell]] was appointed head coach in May. The team was captained by [[Michael Shenton]]. They finished the Super League season in 12th place. == First-team squad == {{Rugby league squad |squadname = 2013 Castleford Tigers squad |BC1 = #ffc200 |FC1 = black |BC2 = black |FC2 = white |list1a
